聽日開始出卡會平D

Dear customer,

Starting August 10, 2020, Dukascopy Bank together with UPS introduce lower fees for express worldwide plastic cards delivery. The new delivery fee will be 10 CHF, meaning a 50% reduction compared to the previous fee of 20 CHF.

Cards will be shipped from Switzerland and delivered personally by a courier to the cardholder, usually in a few working days, depending on the destination country. For each order clients will have a separate tracking code which allows them to track the real-time order location.

Kind regards,
Dukascopy Bank
